headline: Assessing DuPont De Nemours (NYSE:DD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) has been drawing attention after a period of mixed short term returns and stronger longer term performance. This has prompted investors to reassess how its current valuation lines up with recent fundamentals. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. While DuPont de Nemours’ share price softened slightly in the very short term, with a 1 day share price return of 0.80% and a 7 day share price return of 0.88%, the 30 day and year to date share price returns of 13.02%...

headline: DuPont Water Solutions Expands Data-Driven WAVE PRO Design Tool with Reverse Osmosis and Nanofiltration
summary: DuPont Water Solutions today announced the expansion of Water Application Value Engine (WAVE PRO), its advanced online water treatment modeling tool, with the addition of reverse osmosis (RO) and nanofiltration (NF) capabilities. The enhanced platform now integrates ultrafiltration (UF), ion exchange (IX), RO, and NF into a single, comprehensive water treatment design solution for applications including drinking water, industrial utility water, wastewater, and seawater desalination.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Air Products and Chemicals, Albemarle and DuPont de Nemours
summary: ALB, DD and APD lean on cost cuts and price hikes as soft demand in Europe and China pressures the Diversified Chemicals industry.
